record.summary: Closes the gap between "builds from source" and "installable product": pushing a v<semver> tag builds a per-triple archive for the five supported targets, attaches checksums, a CycloneDX SBOM, and a SLSA build-provenance attestation to a GitHub Release, and install.sh (curl | sh) consumes the archives. Mirrors the spec-spine release pipeline (the family precedent this repo's own CI already consumes) plus the fail-fast version guard OPC's release workflow learned the hard way. No registry publishing: the crate is a binary product, not a library.
record.title: Release distribution: tag-gated prebuilt binaries and installer
